members.confirmRemoveDescription: This will revoke their access immediately. They can be re-invited later.

acceptInvite.title: You have been invited
acceptInvite.description: Accept the invitation to join this project.
acceptInvite.loginPrompt: Sign in to accept the invitation.
acceptInvite.error: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
acceptInvite.mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Sign in with the correct account to accept it.
acceptInvite.signInDifferent: Sign in with a different account
